article_title: .NET API 容量规划：从猜测走向可测量扩容
core_theme: 用 SLO、p95 延迟、k6 压测和背压机制，把 .NET API 的容量上限测出来并记录下来。
reader_takeaway: 读者能理解容量规划应关注哪些指标，并能用一个本地实验观察 API 何时退化。
summary_angle: 把发布会议里的模糊判断，变成带条件、带余量、可复测的容量数字。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 Why CPU and RAM Lie to You：CPU 和内存有余量时，连接池、线程池、锁、队列和 p95 延迟仍可能先出问题。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 请求压力从左侧涌入，CPU 指示保持平稳，但延迟和队列暗线开始发亮。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 The Baseline Loop 与 k6/connections.js：先定义 SLO，再跑 200 到 1000 VU 的基线压测，并检查 p95。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中央阈值门旁有一条测量刻度，表现 p95 被持续观察。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 Protecting the write path with backpressure：WriteGate 用 SemaphoreSlim 做有界并发，极端负载下返回 429。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 阈值门把过载请求导入侧边泄压通道，保住已接收请求。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 The Baseline Loop：达到 SLO 后，给预计峰值增加 30-50% 余量并发布容量数字。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧出现稳定输出和安全缓冲区，表示可发布的容量边界。

main_metaphor: 一座可测量的压力闸门保护 API 引擎。
subject_action: 接收请求流，测量延迟，并把超过边界的流量安全分流。
composition: 宽幅 2.35:1，中央单点聚焦，左进右出，周围放 3-4 个短标签信息块。
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: dark gothic illustration, pointed arches, lace shadows, candlelit contrast, ornate black shapes, restrained horror mood
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，本篇从风格池随机选中；容量压力、阈值门和受控降级适合用克制的暗色张力表达。
style_safety_note: 该风格为泛类型描述，不涉及品牌、工作室或艺术家复刻。
draft_goal: 验证中央阈值门、请求压力、p95/429/余量三个叙事节点是否清楚。
revision_targets: 如果文字过多，删到 3 个短标签以内
如果像真实仪表盘，改成抽象压力门
如果画面过暗，提高琥珀和青绿色辅助光
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide cinematic infographic-story cover illustration that summarizes a .NET API capacity planning article. Theme: measuring API capacity with SLOs, p95 latency, repeatable load tests, and planned backpressure. The reader should quickly feel that scaling decisions come from measured limits and predictable degradation.

Summary angle: turn a vague release-room guess into a measured capacity number with guardrails.
Narrative flow: 3-beat process. In a 2.35:1 frame, keep one dominant focal subject and 3 supporting narrative beats. Each beat must map to the article's information blocks rather than generic decoration.
Information blocks:
- problem: CPU and RAM can look fine while p95 latency and queues fail; visible label: "别只看CPU"
- step: define SLO and run baseline/spike tests with k6; visible label: "测p95"
- mechanism: write path uses bounded concurrency/backpressure and can return 429 deliberately; visible label: "429限流"
- takeaway: publish safe RPS with 30-50% headroom; visible label: "留余量"

Main metaphor: a measured pressure gate protecting an API engine.
Subject: a stylized central API gateway engine shaped like a measured threshold gate, absorbing incoming request streams and diverting overload safely.
Composition/framing: wide 2.35:1, central gate as dominant focal subject, left-to-right request flow, three small source-grounded callout chips around it, clear negative space, readable at blog-card size.
Style/medium: combine isometric conceptual systems scene with the selected visual style descriptor: dark gothic illustration, pointed arches, lace shadows, candlelit contrast, ornate black shapes, restrained horror mood. Stylized, polished, editorial, visually strong, and clearly readable as an infographic-style summary cover. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: charcoal black, muted steel gray, warm amber, restrained teal accents.
Visible text policy: allow only 1-3 short Chinese labels or number chips by default, and no more than 4 when strictly necessary, all sourced from the information blocks. Each label <= 6 Chinese characters. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI labels, no fake chart axes, no fake architecture node names.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics, no unrelated icon collage, no decorative clutter.
Avoid: generic robot, code rain, neon city, real product UI, fake terminal, long text, horror gore, excessive purple-blue glow.
